title: Simplify harness to doc-aligned form
description: Strip the project back to the lecture-prescribed minimum: split claude-progress.md into PROGRESS.md + DECISIONS.md, delete speculative lib/ and __tests__, delete redundant docs (UI/VERIFICATION/WHY_HARNESS_FOR_RN/E2E_TESTING), slim survivor docs, drop redundant npm scripts.
verification: claude-progress.md is gone; PROGRESS.md and DECISIONS.md exist
docs/HARNESS.md, docs/SESSION.md, docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/RN_PLATFORM.md are under ~100 lines each
